name: Hichain Logistics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hichain Logistics Co.,Ltd. provides integrated logistics services to computing, television, and consumer electronics manufacturing and trading companies in China and internationally. The company offers transport management, warehousing, and customs clearance services. It also provides international import/export air freight forwarding, land transport, warehouse storage, charter flight, air cargo allotment, cargo shipping, packaging, cargo loading and unloading, international multimodal transport, distribution, transit, long and short haul transport, and international exhibits services; and operates as an entrusted agent for cross border cargos covering custom declarations, inspections, insurance, and custom documentations. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Suzhou, China.
